message:
feat(fcp-async-core): add websocket::client sub-module and migrate MCP test IO

Add a client-focused websocket::client sub-module re-exporting Message,
WebSocket, WebSocketConfig, and WsConnectError. Export WsConnectError at
the top-level websocket module. Fix duplicate assert_type<WebSocketConfig>
in smoke test.

Migrate fwc serve_mcp test IO from raw tokio imports to fcp-async-core
re-exports (AsyncReadExt, AsyncWriteExt, BufReader) and wrap duplex
streams in AsupersyncIo::new() for consistent abstraction usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
